scripts.name: timeblock-organizer
scripts.description: Pull-watches daily pages and reorganizes time-prefixed TODOs into the #TimeBlock parent, sorted by start-time, with the SmartBlock timestamp button pinned last. Fixes scheduling bugs in any writer (Chief of Staff, Better Tasks, manual edits). v1.1.0 adds conflict detection + opt-in auto-resolve via bump_forward cascade.

scripts.name: auto-attribute-todo
scripts.description: Auto-fills BT_attr* on new {{[[TODO]]}} blocks via LiveAI_API. Phase 3 semantic embeddings via Gemini.

scripts.name: explain-block
scripts.description: Brief / detailed / translate / critique / define-terms passes on focused block.

scripts.name: daily-summary
scripts.description: 2-sentence today's-vibe block at top of daily page (manual trigger). Tomorrow-prep too.

scripts.name: lori-review-button
scripts.description: Lori-Boyd-style 6-pass QA review on current page (manual trigger).

scripts.name: update-roam-js
scripts.description: Self-bootstrapper + auto-updater for the suite. Install this one first.
